description_long: This vending machine features a tall, rectangular form with a predominantly tan and brown color scheme. The front panel is adorned with bold branding, including the word 'Sempai' and a stylized illustration of a muscular, anime-inspired character, along with playful text and graphics. The central section of the front face includes a recessed area with a dispensing nozzle and a product retrieval slot below. To the right of the main branding, there are several smaller illustrated panels, likely representing product options or advertisements. The sides of the machine are decorated with the same branding and character artwork, while the top and back are solid black. The overall design is eye-catching and intended to attract attention in an urban environment.
description: A tall, tan and brown vending machine with bold 'Sempai' branding, anime-style artwork, and a central dispensing area. The front features multiple illustrated panels and a prominent product retrieval slot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'Sempai' branding, anime character artwork, and slogan, with no visible interactive components.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main branding, illustrated panels, dispensing nozzle, and product retrieval slot, as well as the most interactive features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with branding and artwork but no visible interactive elements.
description_view_3: Rear or top-down view showing a mostly black, featureless surface with no branding or interactive parts visible.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper central front, featuring printed graphics, branding, and illustrated product options.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A small rectangular slot is located at the lower center of the front face, beneath the dispensing nozzle.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large 'Sempai' logo and text on the front and sides, with tan and brown colors, anime-style character artwork, and additional illustrated panels on the front right.
